segments.scene_description: A static view of a medieval stone bedroom with warm candlelight and sunlight streaming through a green window at the far end. The room features a central bed with gold bedding, wooden furniture including a table and chair on the left and a dresser on the right, and rough stone walls with wooden ceiling beams. No movement or changes occur throughout the segment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, unchanging gaze upon a medieval stone bedroom bathed in a blend of candlelight and filtered sunlight. It begins with a wide view of the interior, where warm light illuminates a central bed draped in gold bedding. The camera remains fixed as the eye takes in the surrounding wooden furniture, including a table and chair to the left and a dresser to the right. The scene persists in this stillness, emphasizing the texture of the rough stone walls and the heavy wooden ceiling beams. Finally, the view lingers on the green window at the far end of the room, where sunlight continues to stream inward without interruption.
